definitions.text: The time of day when the Sun seems to reach its highest point in the sky; solar noon.
examples: On Saturdays, I love to have a lie-in until noon.
The race is due to start at noon sharp.

definitions.text: The mean time of solar noon, marked as twelve o'clock on most clocks.
The corresponding time in the middle of the night; midnight.
To relax or sleep around midday.
The letter ن in the Arabic script.
